brief_justification: Wrong answer (mixing console instead of recording booth) but the false-belief reasoning approach was sound; Goes one level beyond surface by tracking belief states and analyzing attention/awareness; Some self-monitoring in questioning whether Austin witnessed Mark's move; Mentions verification need by asking 'did Austin witness step 3?' but doesn't fully verify against all possibilities; Presents conclusion with moderate confidence but doesn't acknowledge uncertainty about the correct answer; Acknowledges the equipment rack as an alternative but doesn't consider recording booth; Shows clear derivation chain for the wrong conclusion with object location trace
